  "findings": [
    "Brake hose is twisted, causing internal restriction and external stress during suspension travel and steering."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Loosen the brake hose fitting, untwist the hose to its natural, relaxed state, and retorque to OEM specifications.",
    "Inspect the hose for any permanent kinking, cracking, or structural damage, and replace if integrity is compromised."
  ],
  "rationale": "A twisted brake hose restricts fluid flow, which can cause uneven braking or caliper binding. Additionally, the twist subjects the hose to extreme fatigue and potential rupture during steering and suspension movement, posing a severe safety hazard.",
  "references": [
    "FMVSS 106 (Brake Hoses)",
    "OEM Brake Service Specifications"
  ]
}
